inputs.prompt:
A line of small yellow ducklings walking together through a wide green field, gently waddling forward in a calm and playful manner.

The first duckling at the front proudly carries a small red flag, holding it upright as if leading the group.

Soft grass sways lightly in the breeze, with wildflowers scattered across the field, creating a peaceful countryside atmosphere.

The ducklings move in a neat line, occasionally bobbing their heads, with natural and adorable walking motion.

Warm daylight with soft sunlight, pastel green and golden-yellow color palette, cozy and heartwarming mood.

Slow cinematic side-tracking camera movement, eye-level perspective, smooth and stable motion.

Wholesome animated realism style, slightly whimsical but natural, clean and gentle visual tone.

High resolution, smooth transitions, professional color grading.

No text, no logos, no watermarks.
